description: Express app using a factory-created renderer callback that invokes lodash _.template() via dynamic dispatch, triggering CVE-2021-23337 prototype pollution RCE.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.js calls render() which is a closure from createRenderer() in renderer.js that calls _.template(tmpl)(data)

findings.human_justification: _.template() is called inside the closure returned by createRenderer() in renderer.js. The closure is invoked in the /render route with user-controlled input, making the vulnerability exploitable via callback dispatch.
